sentences.target: Hélas, j'ai encore raté le bus.

translations.fr: Hélas, j'ai encore raté le bus.
translations.en: Alas, I missed the bus again.
translations.es: Por desgracia, perdí el autobús otra vez.
translations.de: Leider habe ich den Bus wieder verpasst.
translations.it: Purtroppo ho perso di nuovo l'autobus.
translations.pt: Infelizmente, perdi o ônibus de novo.
translations.he: למרבה הצער, פספסתי שוב את האוטובוס.
translations.tr: Ne yazık ki, otobüsü yine kaçırdım.
translations.vi: Đáng tiếc là tôi lại lỡ xe buýt.
translations.nl: Helaas heb ik de bus weer gemist.
translations.uk: На жаль, я знову пропустив автобус.
translations.hi: अफसोस, फिर से बस छूट गई.
translations.nb: Dessverre gikk jeg glipp av bussen igjen.
translations.ro: Din păcate, am pierdut autobuzul din nou.
translations.ja: 残念ながら、またバスに乗り遅れました。

tokens.explanation: Interjection expressing regret or disappointment.
Clitic subject pronoun (1st person singular) elided before a vowel-initial verb.
Auxiliary verb (présent de l’indicatif, 1st sg) forming the passé composé.
Adverb indicating repetition (‘again’).
Past participle (masc. sg.) of the lexical verb in a compound tense.
Definite article (masculine singular) introducing the noun.
Common noun (masculine singular), direct object of the verb.

sentences.target: Hélas, il pleut depuis ce matin.

translations.fr: Hélas, il pleut depuis ce matin.
translations.en: Alas, it's been raining since this morning.
translations.es: Por desgracia, está lloviendo desde esta mañana.
translations.de: Leider regnet es seit heute Morgen.
translations.ko: 안타깝게도 오늘 아침부터 비가 내리고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 唉，从今天早上一直在下雨。
translations.ru: Увы, дождь идёт с самого утра.
translations.pt: Infelizmente, está chovendo desde hoje de manhã.
translations.he: למרבה הצער, יורד גשם מאז הבוקר.
translations.tr: Ne yazık ki, sabahtan beri yağmur yağıyor.
translations.vi: Đáng tiếc là trời mưa từ sáng nay.
translations.uk: На жаль, дощ іде з самого ранку.
translations.hi: अफसोस, आज सुबह से बारिश हो रही है.
translations.nb: Dessverre har det regnet siden i morges.
translations.id: Sayangnya, hujan turun sejak pagi ini.
translations.sv: Tyvärr regnar det sedan i morse.
translations.ro: Din păcate, plouă de azi dimineață.
translations.da: Desværre har det regnet siden i morges.
translations.fi: Valitettavasti on satanut tänään aamusta lähtien.
translations.ja: 残念ながら、今朝からずっと雨が降っています。

tokens.explanation: Interjection expressing regret or lament.
Impersonal subject pronoun used with weather verbs.
Impersonal verb (présent de l’indicatif, 3rd sg) denoting precipitation.
Preposition marking the starting point of a duration.
Demonstrative determiner modifying a temporal noun.
Common noun (masculine singular) complement of the preposition.

sentences.target: C'est complet pour ce soir, hélas.

translations.fr: C'est complet pour ce soir, hélas.
translations.en: It's fully booked for tonight, alas.
translations.es: Por desgracia, para esta noche está todo completo.
translations.de: Leider ist für heute Abend alles ausgebucht.
translations.it: Purtroppo per stasera è tutto al completo.
translations.ko: 안타깝게도 오늘 밤은 모두 예약이 찼어요.
translations.ru: Увы, на сегодня все места заняты.
translations.pt: Infelizmente, para esta noite está tudo reservado.
translations.he: למרבה הצער, להיום בערב הכול מלא.
translations.tr: Ne yazık ki, bu akşam için her yer dolu.
translations.vi: Đáng tiếc là tối nay đã hết chỗ.
translations.nl: Helaas is het voor vanavond volgeboekt.
translations.uk: На жаль, на сьогодні ввечері все вже заброньовано.
translations.hi: अफसोस, आज रात के लिए सब कुछ बुक है.
translations.pl: Niestety, na dziś wieczór wszystko jest już zajęte.
translations.el: Δυστυχώς, για απόψε είναι όλα κλεισμένα.
translations.nb: Dessverre er det fullt for i kveld.
translations.id: Sayangnya, untuk malam ini sudah penuh.
translations.sv: Tyvärr är det fullt för i kväll.
translations.ro: Din păcate, pentru diseară e totul già rezervat.
translations.cs: Bohužel je na dnešní večer všechno obsazené.
translations.da: Desværre er der fuldt for i aften.
translations.fi: Valitettavasti tälle illalle on jo täyttä.
translations.ja: 残念ながら、今夜は満席です。

tokens.explanation: Clitic demonstrative pronoun elided before a vowel, subject of the copula.
Copular auxiliary (présent de l’indicatif, 3rd sg) linking subject and predicate.
Predicate adjective (masc. sg.) meaning ‘full/sold out’.
Preposition introducing a time-frame complement.
Demonstrative determiner modifying a temporal noun.
Common noun (masculine singular), object of the preposition.
Parenthetical interjection conveying regret.

sentences.target: Hélas, nos vacances sont déjà finies.

translations.fr: Hélas, nos vacances sont déjà finies.
translations.en: Alas, our vacation is already over.
translations.es: Por desgracia, nuestras vacaciones ya han terminado.
translations.de: Leider ist unser Urlaub schon vorbei.
translations.it: Purtroppo le nostre vacanze sono già finite.
translations.zh-Hans: 唉，我们的假期已经结束了。
translations.yue: 唉，我哋嘅假期已經完咗。
translations.he: למרבה הצער, החופשה שלנו כבר נגמרה.
translations.tr: Ne yazık ki tatilimiz çoktan bitti.
translations.vi: Đáng tiếc là kỳ nghỉ của chúng tôi đã kết thúc rồi.
translations.nl: Helaas is onze vakantie al voorbij.
translations.uk: На жаль, наша відпустка вже закінчилася.
translations.hu: Sajnos a nyaralásunk már véget ért.
translations.hi: अफसोस, हमारी छुट्टी पहले ही खत्म हो गई है.
translations.pl: Niestety, nasz urlop już się skończył.
translations.el: Δυστυχώς, οι διακοπές μας έχουν ήδη τελειώσει.
translations.nb: Dessverre er ferien vår allerede over.
translations.sv: Tyvärr är vår semester redan slut.
translations.ro: Din păcate, vacanța noastră s-a încheiat deja.
translations.da: Desværre er vores ferie allerede forbi.
translations.ja: 残念ながら、私たちの休暇はもう終わりました。

tokens.explanation: Interjection expressing regret.
Possessive determiner (1st person plural) agreeing with a plural noun.
Plural-only common noun (feminine plural) serving as subject.
Copular auxiliary (présent de l’indicatif, 3rd pl) linking subject and predicate.
Temporal adverb indicating precedence/earliness.
Predicate adjective (feminine plural) agreeing with ‘vacances’; resultative/state.

Hélas, il pleut depuis ce matin.
C'est complet pour ce soir, hélas.
Hélas, nos vacances sont déjà finies.
fr: Hélas, j'ai encore raté le bus.
Hélas, il pleut depuis ce matin.
C'est complet pour ce soir, hélas.
Hélas, nos vacances sont déjà finies.
en: Alas, I missed the bus again.
Alas, it's been raining since this morning.
It's fully booked for tonight, alas.
Alas, our vacation is already over.
